---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

<!-- Optionally link a PDF CV: place cv.pdf in assets/ and uncomment below -->
<!-- [{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download full CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary} -->

## Contact

**Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD** *(he/him/his)*
Postdoctoral Researcher, Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of Medicine
The University of British Columbia, Vancouver Campus
2635 Laurel Street, Vancouver, BC V5Z 1M9, Canada
Phone: +1 236 996 8791 · Email: [huan.tran@ubc.ca](mailto:huan.tran@ubc.ca)

## Education

- **PhD** — Taipei Medical University, Taiwan
- **MD** — Hue University of Medicine and Pharmacy, Vietnam

## Appointments

- **Postdoctoral Researcher**, Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of Medicine, University of British Columbia, Vancouver, Canada

## Research areas

Respiratory epidemiology · Environmental & occupational exposure ·
Air pollution & wildfire smoke · Population cohort analysis · Biostatistics (R, Quarto)

## Skills

- **Statistical computing:** R, Quarto, reproducible pipelines, high-performance computing (Sockeye)
- **Methods:** epidemiological study design, survival analysis, cohort & case-crossover designs

<!-- TODO: add grants, awards, teaching, presentations as desired -->
